$comment: ProspectIQ handoff contract between ml/ and backend/. Do not edit unilaterally - message the other dev first if a field needs to change.

persona_label.description: Human-readable persona segment, for internal/demo context only - not shown to end RM necessarily

repayment_capacity_score.description: RCS - FOIR-based repayment capacity, higher is better

conversion_propensity_score.description: CPS - behavioral engagement/intent score, higher is better

tier.description: Derived from combined RCS + CPS thresholds

thin_file.description: True if customer has no/limited bureau credit score and was scored via alt-data (transaction-based) approach only

eligible_loan_amount.description: Estimated eligible amount in INR, rounded to nearest 1000

items.factor: string - short human readable factor, e.g. 'Low FOIR (18%)'

top_factors.description: Top factors driving the score, for the explainability panel

explanation_text.example: Strong repayment capacity with low existing obligations and rising loan intent. Recommend contacting within 48 hours.
explanation_text.description: Plain-English RM-facing summary, one to two sentences

example_record.name: Arjun Kumar
example_record.explanation_text: Strong repayment capacity with low existing obligations and rising loan intent. Recommend contacting within 48 hours.

endpoints_using_this_schema.GET /leads: returns array of records in this shape (ranked)
endpoints_using_this_schema.GET /leads/{id}: returns a single record in this shape
endpoints_using_this_schema.POST /simulate: accepts raw customer input, returns a record in this shape computed live
